data.body:
[10/23(Thu) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be abusing in-game mechanics to gain an unfair advantage over others.
 
▶ Total number of players banned: 14,832
▶ Period of Restriction: Permanent
 
We will never tolerate illegal programs under any circumstances as they may potentially harm the game's environment and other players.
 
Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3192728

#BlueArchive
